sentences.arabic: نَظَّفَ عَمَّارٌ الْمَسْجِدَ قَبْلَ صَلَاةِ الْجُمُعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ammar je počistio džamiju prije džuma-namaza.
sentences.translationEn: Ammar cleaned the mosque before Friday prayer.

sentences.translation: Pomeo je pod i pažljivo očistio prozore.
sentences.translationEn: He swept the floor and cleaned the windows carefully.
He loved to serve the mosque himself.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْإِمَامُ: جَزَاكَ اللَّهُ خَيْرًا يَا عَمَّارُ.
sentences.translation: Imam je rekao: Allah ti nagradio dobrim, Ammare.
sentences.translationEn: The imam said: May God reward you with good, Ammar.
